subject: Re: can WARP remove gold fiducials?
body:
Warptools plugin is about to be released for scipion framework. And fiddler
is showing great results. Probably this week both will be released. They
are already available for betstesting

El vie., 22 nov. 2024 18:27, alist...@gmail.com <alisterburt@gmail.com>
escribió:

> Hi Jesse,
>
> Not as far as I know, as an alternative you could try
> https://teamtomo.org/fidder/
>
> Cheers,
>
> Alister
